text:
Clash of the Titans arc is the seventh story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

During the assault on Stohess to capture Annie Leonhart, the Scout Regiment recruits from the 104th Cadet Corps are kept in holding south of Wall Rose under suspicions of a Titan spy among them when Titans are spotted within the Walls.

The recruits and their seniors must spread the word of invasion, find the breach in the Wall, and evacuate the residents of Wall Rose before humanity is cut in half once again.
